evidence: "Dark and depressing. Lost young woman abusing alcohol/drugs and having bad sex..."
"This was unbearable to watch. Aside from the military theme music throughout, the characters and situations were just plain daft and cringeworthy."
"Concept was good. Script, acting and direction could not hold my interest."
"Interesting, but way too long/gets repetitive. There also wasn't much I hadn't heard before from other films."
"So incredibly slow, boring, depressing. Awful dialogue and acting. Had to switch it off!"
"Incredibly slow, boring, depressing. Awful dialogue and acting. Had to switch it off!"
"First episode: acting very flat, man survives fiery explosion with a few scratches..."
"These are great actresses. However, I couldn't wait for this movie to be over. Very unrealistic."
"I could tell from the disturbing dream sequence and foul language things were only going to get worse... for pure shock value."
"I mainly kept watching for McDormand: she's mesmerizing. And her hubby. However, lots of death, suicide, near death, estrangement..."
"I couldn't wait for this movie to be over. Very unrealistic."

summary: The user shows a strong preference for drama and reality genres, often expressing dissatisfaction with pacing and production quality. They tend to favor simple narratives and have low emotional engagement with the content, indicating a critical view of storytelling and character development.
